====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Cherubi 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=no
|trainer=Gardenia
|gender=female
|pkmn=Cherubi
|type1=Grass
|img=Gardenia Cherubi Adventures.png
|img_size=180px
|epnum=PS346
|epname=Ring Around the Roserade I
|desc=Roserade and {{p|Cherubi}} were both sent against Platinum in a Double Battle. Since the opponent's chosen Pokémon could use Fire and Ice attacks, Gardenia used the wide area of her plain grass Gym to not being hit by those type of attacks. As a distance-attack technique, Roserade used her poisonous vines under the arena, who defeated Ponyta and badly injured Prinplup. After being attacked by Cherubi's {{m|Grass Knot}} (which was more powerful upon {{p|Piplup}}'s Evolution, since her weight had increased), she used her {{m|Blizzard}} in the tunnels the vines had dug, to deliver an underground at-distance attack.

Cherubi's only known move is {{m|Grass Knot}}, and her Ability is {{a|Chlorophyll}}.}}

{{anchor|Roserade 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=no
|trainer=Gardenia
|gender=female
|pkmn=Roserade
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Gardenia Roserade Adventures.png
|img_size=180px
|epnum=PS346
|epname=Ring Around the Roserade I
|desc={{p|Roserade}} and Cherubi were both sent against Platinum in a Double Battle. Since the opponent's chosen Pokémon could use Fire and Ice attacks, Gardenia used the wide area of her plain grass Gym to not being hit by those type of attacks. As a distance-attack technique, Roserade used her poisonous vines under the arena, who defeated Ponyta and badly injured Prinplup. After being attacked by Cherubi's {{m|Grass Knot}}, Prinplup used her {{m|Blizzard}} in the tunnels the vines had dug, to deliver an underground at distance attack, who defeated both.

Roserade was later seen helping in destroying one of the [[Red Chain]]s [[Cyrus]] created.

Roserade's only known move is {{m|Grass Knot}}, and her Ability is {{a|Poison Point}}.}}

=====Given away=====
{{TrainerPoké

|epname=Double Trouble with Dialga and Palkia III
|desc=This {{p|Cherrim}} was given to Platinum by Gardenia, and was taken with the rest of Platinum's Pokémon to help Looker investigate on the [[Distortion World]].

Cherrim's only known move is {{m|Solar Beam}}, and her Ability is {{a|Flower Gift}}.}}
